summary: Comprehensive testing of GST Master Module. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend GST Master page verified with 3 tabs (GST Slabs, HSN Codes, GST Ledger) working correctly. GST auto-calculation in sales/purchases is implemented via calculate_gst_for_item() helper function.
passed_tests: POST /api/gst-slabs/initialize - Initialize default Indian GST slabs (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%)
GET /api/gst-slabs - List all GST slabs with correct structure
POST /api/gst-slabs - Create new custom GST slab
PUT /api/gst-slabs/{slab_id} - Update GST slab (non-rate fields only for audit safety)
POST /api/hsn-codes - Create HSN code with GST slab link
GET /api/hsn-codes - List HSN codes with enriched GST slab details
POST /api/hsn-codes - Invalid GST slab ID rejection (400 error)
GET /api/gst-ledger/summary - Get GST summary for GSTR-1/GSTR-3B reporting
GET /api/gst-ledger/by-slab - Get GST breakup by rate
Items API - gst_slab_id field verified in item schema
POST /api/items - Create item with GST slab linked
Stores API - Verified stores exist for invoice creation

features: Summary cards showing GST Slabs count, HSN Codes count, Output GST, Input GST (ITC)
GST Slabs table with CODE, NAME, TOTAL RATE, CGST, SGST, IGST, CESS, STATUS, ACTIONS
Add GST Slab modal with auto-calculation of CGST/SGST (50% each)
HSN Codes table with search and Add HSN Code button
GST Ledger with Output GST (Sales), Input GST (Purchases), Net GST Liability summary
GST Ledger filters: Type, From Date, To Date
GST Rate Rules information panel explaining audit safety

items_page_gst_dropdown.location: Items > Add/Edit Item > Pricing & Tax tab
features: GST Slab dropdown populated from GST Master
Fallback to legacy rates (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%) if no slabs
Helper text: 'GST is auto-calculated from master'

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: GST Master is single source of truth - all GST rates defined in gst_slabs collection
GOOD: GST rates are immutable once created (for audit safety) - only name/description/is_active can be updated
GOOD: calculate_gst_for_item() helper function centralizes all GST calculations
GOOD: record_gst_ledger_entry() ensures all GST transactions are recorded in audit trail
GOOD: Sales and Purchases auto-calculate GST from item's linked GST slab
GOOD: GST Ledger provides summary for GSTR-1/GSTR-3B reporting
GOOD: HSN codes are linked to GST slabs for proper categorization
GOOD: Frontend GST Slab dropdown in Items page fetches from GST Master API

success_rate.frontend: 100% (GST Master page and all 3 tabs verified)

seed_data_creation: Default GST slabs initialized: GST_0 (0%), GST_5 (5%), GST_12 (12%), GST_18 (18%), GST_28 (28%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST Master Module fully implemented and tested. Key collections: gst_slabs (GST rate master), hsn_codes (HSN with GST slab link), gst_ledger (audit trail). GST auto-calculation happens via calculate_gst_for_item() in server.py. Sales/Purchases record GST ledger entries via record_gst_ledger_entry(). Frontend GST Master page accessible from sidebar under SYSTEM section.

gst_auto_calculation.description: GST auto-calculated from item's gst_slab_id in sales and purchases

features: All GST transactions recorded in gst_ledger
